Container.Name: raid-mod-manager
Container.Overview: Web-based mod manager for SPT-Tarkov, FIKA Server and FIKA Headless. Browse, enable/disable, upload and install mods from a tactical dark UI.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the Mod Manager web interface.

Config.Name: Config / Data
Config.Description: Stores config.json and persists profile settings across restarts.

Config.Name: FIKA Server — Mods Folder
Config.Description: Path to your FIKA Server BepInEx plugins folder on the Unraid host.

Config.Name: FIKA Headless — Mods Folder
Config.Description: Path to your FIKA Headless BepInEx plugins folder on the Unraid host.

Config.Name: SPT Client — Mods Folder (optional)
Config.Description: Only needed if your SPT Windows client mods are reachable from Unraid (e.g. via Samba share). Leave blank to skip.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your timezone, e.g. Europe/Berlin or America/New_York.

Config.Name: FIKA Server — Display Label
Config.Description: Display name shown in the UI for the FIKA Server profile.

Config.Name: FIKA Server — Accent Colour
Config.Description: Hex colour used for the FIKA Server profile badge in the UI.

Config.Name: FIKA Headless — Display Label
Config.Description: Display name shown in the UI for the FIKA Headless profile.

Config.Name: FIKA Headless — Accent Colour
Config.Description: Hex colour used for the FIKA Headless profile badge in the UI.

Config.Name: SPT Client — Display Label
Config.Description: Display name shown in the UI for the SPT Client profile.

Config.Name: SPT Client — Accent Colour
Config.Description: Hex colour used for the SPT Client profile badge in the UI.

Config.Name: Data Directory (internal)
Config.Description: Internal container path where config.json is stored. Only change if you know what you're doing.

Config.Name: Login Password
Config.Description: Set a password to require login when accessing over the internet. Leave empty to disable authentication (recommended for LAN-only use).

Config.Name: Session Duration (hours)
Config.Description: How long a login session lasts before requiring re-authentication. Default: 72 hours (3 days).
